claim_statement: The ratio ell_D_P / ell_D_T equals d_s / (d_s - 2), predicted to be 1.961 from d_s = 4.082, consistent with observed ratio 1.970 from T-052.
dataset: Planck CMB TT/EE power spectra + Jaccard graph G18d v2
method: Compute predicted ratio from d_s = 4.082 +/- 0.125. Compare to empirical ratio from T-052 best-fit parameters. Propagate d_s uncertainty. Assess discrepancy in sigma units.
pass_condition: Predicted ratio within 2-sigma of observed ratio 1.970, using propagated d_s uncertainty as sigma.
fail_condition: Predicted ratio deviates from 1.970 by more than 2-sigma after propagating d_s uncertainty.
